description: Org-authored rules — the Figma Context stand-in. Every generating surface reads these before producing output. Rules with enforcement 'judge' are checked deterministically by parity/judge.ts; 'agent' rules guide generation and are reviewed by humans.

rules.statement: Every UI element comes from the catalog. Unknown components are gaps to report, never to invent.
No literal colors or pixel values anywhere. All styling flows through design tokens (var(--…)) — and in screens, styling flows only through components.
Never use raw HTML elements the system provides a component for.
No className or style props on system components. If a component can't express it, that's a gap in the contract — report it.
At most one primary Button per screen.
Compose layout with Stack and Inline, not hand-styled wrappers.
Avatars represent people or entities, never decoration.
